summary: Iteration 106 testing complete. All trust and accuracy features verified: 1) Methodology page loads with 7 signal explanations, weight distribution bar, 5 FAQs, confidence levels section, and disclaimers section, 2) Accuracy page loads with 4 case studies (predicted vs actual), 3 summary stats (85% margin accuracy, 78% trend direction, 4h refresh), and 3 limitations, 3) Sample product analysis shows 2 High confidence indicators, 4 data source labels (Google Trends UK, Amazon UK BSR, TikTok Shop, CJ Dropshipping), 'Last updated' timestamp, and accuracy disclaimer, 4) Free Tools page shows accuracy disclaimer ('Calculator results are estimates...') and all 6 tool tabs, 5) Comparison pages have correct FAQ counts (Jungle Scout: 3, Sell The Trend: 2), 6) Footer has Methodology and Accuracy links, 7) ViabilityBadge expandable links to /methodology and /accuracy verified.

critical_code_review_comments: MethodologyPage.jsx has well-structured SIGNALS array with 7 items, each containing name, weight, icon, color, sources, description, and calculation method
AccuracyPage.jsx has CASE_STUDIES array with 4 curated examples showing predicted vs actual data - MOCKED data (intentional)
AccuracyDisclaimer.jsx provides 4 contextual disclaimer types: margin, score, trend, calculator

LandingLayout.jsx footer includes Methodology and Accuracy links in PRODUCT section
